message:
test: pin prctl + getrandom + getentropy conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_prctl_random.rs covering 3 functions:
- prctl: PR_GET_NAME (cross fl/lc match), PR_SET_NAME (round-trip via
  fl-set + lc-get with restore), PR_GET_DUMPABLE, PR_GET_PDEATHSIG,
  invalid-option edge
- getrandom: 4 buffer sizes (0/1/32/256), GRND_NONBLOCK flag
- getentropy: 256B max, >256 fail per POSIX

10 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-prr1
